output_text: A 7-year-old British schoolgirl, India Mayhew, has died after being thrown from a horse while on holiday in India with her family. The incident occurred at a riding facility in Matheran, 20 miles east of Mumbai, when the horse suddenly bolted and dragged her a distance, causing serious head injuries. Her parents, who were also present, managed to control the horse and rushed her to a nearby health center, but she was declared dead on arrival. The police have registered a case of accidental death and are providing consular assistance to the family.
